node24.command: bundled Node 24.14.0 --test test/feedback-trust.test.js test/agent-runtime.test.js test/agent-tools.test.js test/agent-evaluation.test.js

observedEvaluationIterations: Final required run: 50 passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped.
behaviorDifference: Every /api/recommend request now runs inside AgentRuntime and adds a safe run summary. Planned structured, detail and semantic capabilities execute through the shared Tool Registry/Executor; query events can correlate runId. Existing deterministic parsing, statistics, filtering, sorting, evidence, conclusion validation and response fields remain in their original modules.
knownLimitations: Phase 1 deliberately retains the fixed workflow and existing IntentEnvelope; TaskFrame and shadow semantic parsing start in phase 2.
The 50-case dataset is the minimum fixed contract suite and does not replace the phase 0 300-case real-style failure dataset.
Evaluation latency uses an injected deterministic clock and is not a production network SLA.

System Node 18.20.8 lacks node:sqlite and an optional SQLite driver, so 20 SQLite/provider/obsolete full-suite cases remain skipped and are not counted as passed; Node 24 verification passed without skips.
rollback: Revert implementation commit bfcaa5e. The nullable SQLite query_events.run_id column is backward-compatible and can remain unused; no destructive data rollback is required.
